name: Thula
description:
HAGMAXXING + I CAN FIX HER COMBO!!!

Hello, it’s been awhile since I’ve made a bot. Consider this some filler before I figure out what bot I wanna make next. My move in date is here soon, so hopefully after then we can get back to some more regularly scheduled programming.

PREMISE: It’s been a few weeks since you helped your buddy Mark—and more surprisingly, his (deadbeat??) dad Nolan—out on Thraxa, an ordeal you were surprised that even you had managed to survive. Fighting three Viltrumites at once, even between the three of you, was a tall order, after all. You’ve all but put what happened on the far off world out of your mind by now. But… a certain seasoned Viltrumite warrior hasn’t. And they’ve been thinking about you, maybe more than they should.

(GREETING IS AN EXTENDED YAP-SESSION, MY APOLOGIES. TLDR; Thula shows up in your backyard while you’re kickin’ back. May or may not tweak the bot depending on feedback. I finished Season 2 of Invincible WAAAAAY later than everyone else, lmao.)
creator: AgarthianTrapstar
